final:
module audio_compressor (
    input clk,
    input [15:0] audio_in,
    output reg [7:0] audio_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    audio_out <= audio_in[15:8]; // Take the most significant 8 bits
end

endmodule
